name: chart/histogram
description: Frequency histogram using Freedman–Diaconis binning with hover tooltips.

meta.name: Histogram
meta.description: Frequency histogram using Freedman–Diaconis binning with hover tooltips.

props.name: data
props.description: Array of numeric values to bin

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names merged onto the root element.

props.name: plain
props.description: Marks only — no axes, grid lines, or legend. For micro/inline charts.

examples.title: Basic histogram

whenToUse: Showing the frequency distribution of a single continuous variable
Revealing the shape, spread, and skew of binned numeric data
whenNotToUse: Comparing discrete labelled categories — use BarChart
Comparing distribution summaries across groups — use Boxplot

related.name: BarChart
related.reason: Use for discrete categorical values, not binned ranges

related.name: Boxplot
related.reason: Use to compare distribution summaries across multiple groups

intent.a11yRationale: Renders with role="img" and requires a title prop for screen reader labeling.
